Dental services at the Spray clinic are limited to oral hygiene (cleaning). 712 Jay Street Fossil, OR 97830 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS OF BENTON AND LINN COUNTIES BENTON HEALTH CENTER DENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for overall health and prevention such as cleanings, x-rays, fillings, extractions, periodontics, and dental health education. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-0123 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a dental clinic four times per year, in partnership with the University of Washington Dental School. Services include screenings, fillings, removal of teeth, and treatment of infection. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: -Medicaid-eligible children over the age of 6 and their parents -Low-income veterans without dental coverage -Ages 60 and older who are low-income and without dental coverage Hours: Clinics are held four times per year Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK DONATED DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental services to older adults, people with disabilities, and medically fragile individuals through a network of volunteer dentists and dental labs. A volunteer dentist will come up with a treatment plan, with the goal of making sure the patient is pain-free and able to eat properly. Does not provide emergency care. Services may include: -Dental cleanings -Cavity prevention (sealants, fluoride treatments/supplements) -Dental prosthodontics (dentures, bridges, crowns, implants) -Orthodontics -Endodontics -Dental restoration -Periodontics -Oral/maxillofacial surgery -Cosmetic dentistry 1800 15th Street Suite 100 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: Veterans and individuals who cannot pay for dental care and who are age 65 and older, have a permanent disability, or are medically compromised. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (503) 594-0837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dental care such as diagnostic, preventive, restorative, oral surgery, endodontic, fixed, and removable prosthetics. Also can deliver dental treatment to non-ambulatory patients in care facilities and private homes. 16500 SE 15th Street Suite 150 Vancouver, WA 98683 Eligibility: Age 55 and older or any age who are homebound or in need of a wheelchair-accessible clinic Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (360) 326-3829 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general dental care including dental restorations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Members of any federally recognized tribe or spouse of Grand Ronde Tribal member.
